risk: apps/api does not expose an HTTP API runtime.
evidence: apps/api/src/main.ts exports/logs apiManifest only; no HTTP server, routes, middleware, validation, or database access.
impact: Frontend pages cannot consume real backend APIs beyond Next /api/health.
recommendedCorrection: In a later sequence, formalize API runtime responsibilities without replacing the stack.
requiredSequence: Sequence 2 or later backend foundation sequence

risk: No configured database connection, ORM, query library, migrations, schemas, or seed scripts were found.
evidence: packages/database and infrastructure/database contain README placeholders only; package dependencies include no database libraries.
impact: Business modules cannot persist state yet; SQL Server is not confirmed as configured.
recommendedCorrection: Add database configuration and migration baseline only when the database sequence begins.

risk: server.js duplicates app data and fallback UI.
evidence: server.js embeds module lists, production types, pipeline stages, CSS, and fallback HTML separately from @cacsms/contracts and Next components.
impact: Navigation and counts can drift between fallback and main app.
recommendedCorrection: Refactor fallback to consume shared contracts or reduce fallback surface later.

risk: Global CSS contains multiple layout systems and static page styles outside a formal design token system.
evidence: apps/web/app/globals.css contains shared shell, module workspace, landing dashboard, and dark sidebar overrides; static public pages each have separate CSS.
impact: Future module work can accidentally regress sidebar/layout styling.
recommendedCorrection: Create a documented token/component style layer before broad UI expansion.

evidence: pnpm --filter @cacsms/web lint invokes next lint, which prompts for ESLint configuration and exits non-zero.
recommendedCorrection: Migrate to ESLint CLI/config in a later maintenance sequence.

risk: Test scripts only run TypeScript checks; no behavioral tests exist.
evidence: tests/* contain README placeholders; package test scripts run tsc --noEmit.
impact: UI/runtime regressions can pass test commands.
recommendedCorrection: Add focused tests after stable API/UI contracts are defined.

evidence: server.js reads process.env directly and Next health route reads CACSMS_PUBLIC_PORT directly.
impact: Misconfiguration may surface at runtime instead of startup.

risk: Authentication and authorization are intentionally absent.
evidence: No middleware, login routes, session/token dependency, or protected routes found.
impact: Appropriate for current development access rule; not production-secure yet.
recommendedCorrection: Document future hooks only until Administration/security sequence.
